case_title: L & L CONSTRUCTION INC. VS. LOUIS LEONG

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF L & L CONSTRUCTION INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF L & L CONSTRUCTION INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BENTLEY CAPITAL THE STRAITS GROUP LLC AKA THE STRAITS MANAGEMENT COMPANY, LLC YEO, CHRISTOPHER YEO, KELLY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE QUEENA HO FILED BY L & L CONSTRUCTION INC. LEONG, LOUIS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEES $200.00 SERVED JUL-15-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT YEO, CHRISTOPHER
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2014 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,700.00 FILED BY L & L CONSTRUCTION INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LEONG, LOUIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-12-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEES $150.00 SERVED MAY-23-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT LEONG, LOUIS

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-12-2013 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO AUG-07-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. "DEFENDANT LEONG IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO AMEND COMPLAINT NAMING NEW DEFENDANT(S) AND TO SERVE THE NEW DEFENDANT(S). TRIAL IS CONTINUED TO AUGUST 7, 2013 AT 10:00AM", PER JUDGE PRO TEM QUEENA HO. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA HO. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,700.00 FILED BY L & L CONSTRUCTION INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BENTLEY CAPITAL THE STRAITS GROUP LLC AKA THE STRAITS MANAGEMENT COMPANY, LLC YEO, CHRISTOPHER YEO, KELLY

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BENTLEY CAPITAL THE STRAITS GROUP LLC AKA THE STRAITS MANAGEMENT COMPANY, LLC YEO, CHRISTOPHER YEO, KELLY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEES $200.00 SERVED JUL-20-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BENTLEY CAPITAL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEES $200.00 SERVED JUL-20-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT YEO, KELLY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-07-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-07-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DISMISSAL WITH PERJUDICE FILED ON 6/12/13 FOR DEFENDANT LOUIS LEONG. THREE DEFENDANTS WERE PRESENT, EXCEPT FOURTH DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER YEO WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT KELLY YEO REPRESENTED HERSELF AND HER HUSBAND CHRISTOPHER YEO; THE STRAITS GROUP ETC.--MANAGER (KNOWLEDGABLE PERSON). PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY ANN DONG--OFFICER . ALL THREE DEFENDANTS WAIVED UNTIMELY SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-07-2013 - JUDGMENT.
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO LOUIS LEONG BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JUN-12-2013 AT 10:00 AM.
